_meta.notes: Auto-populated descriptions for LoreRim 5 mods. Populated incrementally as modlist is processed.

Skyrim Script Extender (SKSE64).summary: The Skyrim Script Extender (SKSE) is a tool used by many Skyrim mods to expand scripting capabilities and add new functionality to the game. Required by virtually every complex mod.
Skyrim Script Extender (SKSE64).author: Ian Patterson, Stephen Abel, Paul Connelly

SkyUI.summary: A sleek and PC-friendly interface replacement for Skyrim's inventory, magic, and other menus. Also provides the Mod Configuration Menu (MCM) used by hundreds of mods. Essential for any modded playthrough.
SkyUI.author: schlangster

Unofficial Skyrim Special Edition Patch.summary: A comprehensive bugfix mod for The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim - Special Edition. Fixes hundreds of gameplay, quest, NPC, object, item, text, and placement bugs. Considered mandatory for any modded install.
Unofficial Skyrim Special Edition Patch.author: Arthmoor

Requiem - The Roleplaying Overhaul.summary: Requiem is a project with the goal of turning Skyrim into a better roleplaying experience. It accomplishes this through complete deleveling of the world, stat-based character building, and punishing but fair combat. The backbone of LoreRim's gameplay. Enemy difficulty is tied to stats, not scaling — early game requires extreme caution.
Requiem - The Roleplaying Overhaul.author: Xarrian & Ogerboss

SSE Engine Fixes (skse64 plugin).summary: A collection of engine bug fixes and performance improvements for Skyrim Special Edition. Fixes critical issues like the save corruption bug, tree LOD flickering, and various engine-level problems that Bethesda never patched.
SSE Engine Fixes (skse64 plugin).author: aers, Nukem, Ryan

Address Library for SKSE Plugins.summary: A resource library providing version-independent address data for SKSE plugins. Required by most modern SKSE-based mods to ensure compatibility across game versions.
Address Library for SKSE Plugins.author: meh321

Wintersun - Faiths of Skyrim.summary: Adds religion and worship mechanics to Skyrim. Pray at shrines to gain deity favor, then unlock powerful blessings and abilities. Features 70+ deities with unique mechanics, taboos, and passive bonuses. LoreRim integrates this deeply — your chosen deity should fit your character concept. Neglecting worship reduces favor over time.
Wintersun - Faiths of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Ordinator - Perks of Skyrim.summary: Overhauls the perk trees to add 400+ new perks, transforming each skill into a deep and rewarding progression system. Pairs with Requiem for highly specialized, build-defining character development. Every perk choice matters — respeccing is not possible in Requiem.
Ordinator - Perks of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Apocalypse - Magic of Skyrim.summary: Adds 155 new spells to Skyrim that are unique, balanced, and lore-friendly. Covers all schools of magic with creative new options. Essential for mage builds — many LoreRim magic builds rely on Apocalypse spells for their core combat rotation.
Apocalypse - Magic of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Imperious - Races of Skyrim.summary: Overhauls the ten playable races with unique abilities, passives, and a special power that requires completing a short quest. Makes race choice a meaningful roleplaying and mechanical decision in LoreRim's Requiem framework.
Imperious - Races of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Andromeda - Standing Stones of Skyrim.summary: Replaces the 13 Standing Stone effects with new abilities that unlock over time as you use them, making stone choice a meaningful part of character identity. In LoreRim, your Standing Stone (birthsign) is a permanent choice — choose wisely at character creation.
Andromeda - Standing Stones of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Sacrosanct - Vampires of Skyrim.summary: A complete overhaul of Skyrim's vampire gameplay, adding a progression system with powers that grow as you feed. Synergizes with Dawnguard questline. Vampirism is a major build commitment in LoreRim — research the mechanics before starting Dawnguard.
Sacrosanct - Vampires of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Growl - Werebeasts of Skyrim.summary: Overhauls werewolf and werebear gameplay with new abilities, a perk tree, and progression system. Companions questline leads to lycanthropy — Growl makes it a meaningful alternative to Sacrosanct vampirism.
Growl - Werebeasts of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Summermyst - Enchantments of Skyrim.summary: Adds 120 new enchantments for weapons and armor, greatly expanding gear customization. Essential for enchanting-focused builds or min-maxing endgame gear in LoreRim.
Summermyst - Enchantments of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Odin - Skyrim Magic Overhaul.summary: Overhauls and expands vanilla spells, adding new spells and improving existing ones for a more cohesive magic system. Complements Apocalypse by improving the quality of base-game spells.
Odin - Skyrim Magic Overhaul.author: EnaiSiaion

Vokrii - Minimalistic Perks of Skyrim.summary: A lightweight perk overhaul that adds interesting build options without overwhelming complexity. Used in some LoreRim configurations instead of or alongside Ordinator.
Vokrii - Minimalistic Perks of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Triumvirate - Mage Archetypes.summary: Adds 65 new spells representing five mage archetypes: Druid, Cleric, Shaman, Warlock, and Sorcerer. Tailored for roleplaying specific magical disciplines.
Triumvirate - Mage Archetypes.author: EnaiSiaion

Nemesis Unlimited Behavior Engine.summary: A behavior framework that allows multiple animation mods to work together. Replaces FNIS for LoreRim's animation stack. Required for most combat animation mods. Runs during the setup process — do not skip.
Nemesis Unlimited Behavior Engine.author: Shout-Out and ShikyoKira

XP32 Maximum Skeleton Special Extended -.summary: An extended skeleton with support for combat styles and additional bone nodes. Required by almost all weapon and animation mods. The foundation for LoreRim's combat animation system.
XP32 Maximum Skeleton Special Extended -.author: Groovtama

True Directional Movement - Modernized T.summary: Overhauls third-person movement with target lock, strafing, and directional movement. Makes Skyrim feel like a modern action RPG. Core to LoreRim's combat feel — the target lock system is essential for boss fights.
True Directional Movement - Modernized T.author: mrowrpurr

The Ultimate Dodge Mod.summary: Adds a dedicated dodge mechanic to Skyrim using a configurable hotkey. Essential for LoreRim's combat — Requiem's punishing damage makes positioning and dodging critical to survival.
The Ultimate Dodge Mod.author: ShoryukenToTheChin

Immersive Armors.summary: Adds 55 new sets of armor to the world of Skyrim in a lore-friendly way. Distributed through crafting, leveled lists, and unique named characters. Greatly expands mid-game gear options.
Immersive Armors.author: hothtrooper44

Immersive Weapons.summary: Adds 230 new weapons to the world of Skyrim in a lore-friendly way. Distributed through leveled lists and unique characters. Expands weapon variety significantly for all combat styles.
Immersive Weapons.author: hothtrooper44

Skyrim Flora Overhaul SE.summary: A comprehensive visual overhaul of Skyrim's plant life, trees, and ground cover. Significantly improves the visual quality of nature environments.
Skyrim Flora Overhaul SE.author: vurt

Static Mesh Improvement Mod - SMIM.summary: Greatly improves a large number of 3D models for things like fences, chains, ropes, candles, cauldrons, and more. One of the most widespread visual improvement mods, touching thousands of objects.
Static Mesh Improvement Mod - SMIM.author: Brumbek

Realistic Water Two SE.summary: Adds better water flow, splashing, and faster water movement. Customizes water in each region of Skyrim for a more realistic and visually varied experience.
Realistic Water Two SE.author: isoku

Immersive Citizens - AI Overhaul.summary: Improves the AI of friendly NPCs to make them more immersive and lifelike. NPCs will seek shelter during storms, sleep, eat, and react more naturally to combat. Significant impact on town atmosphere.
Immersive Citizens - AI Overhaul.author: Arnaud dOrchymont

Relationship Dialogue Overhaul - RDO.summary: Adds over 5000 lines of new dialogue for NPCs based on their relationship to the player and their factions. Makes companions and allies feel more responsive and personal.
Relationship Dialogue Overhaul - RDO.author: cloudedtruth

Interesting NPCs SE (3DNPC).summary: Adds over 250 fully voiced NPCs with complex schedules, extensive dialogue, and new quests. Several become followers with unique personalities. One of the most expansive NPC mods ever made.
Interesting NPCs SE (3DNPC).author: Kris Takahashi

Alternate Start - Live Another Life.summary: Provides an alternative means to start the game for those who do not wish to go through the lengthy intro sequence. Choose a background and starting location. In LoreRim's Requiem, your starting location critically affects early-game difficulty.
Alternate Start - Live Another Life.author: Arthmoor

NORDIC UI - Interface Overhaul.summary: A comprehensive UI overhaul replacing Skyrim's menus, HUD, and interface elements with a clean, modern Nordic-inspired design. Pairs with SkyUI for a cohesive visual experience.
NORDIC UI - Interface Overhaul.author: dopesan

Campfire - Complete Camping System.summary: A fully-featured camping system with tents, campfires, survival skills, and roleplay elements. Integrates with Frostfall for a complete survival experience.
Campfire - Complete Camping System.author: Chesko

Frostfall - Hypothermia Camping Survival.summary: Adds a thermal system where exposure to cold weather, rain, and water can kill you. Requires managing warmth through clothing, fires, and shelter. Core survival mod — dress appropriately for conditions in LoreRim.
Frostfall - Hypothermia Camping Survival.author: Chesko

iNeed - Food Water and Sleep.summary: Adds needs for food, water, and sleep that must be managed. Starvation, dehydration, and sleep deprivation have increasingly severe penalties. Core survival mechanic in LoreRim.
iNeed - Food Water and Sleep.author: isoku

Obsidian Weathers and Seasons.summary: An atmospheric weather overhaul with over 75 weather varieties, stunning sunsets, and immersive storms. Pairs with ENB presets for LoreRim's visual presentation.
Obsidian Weathers and Seasons.author: SomberLad

Lanterns Of Skyrim II.summary: Adds thousands of lanterns throughout Skyrim, illuminating roads, towns, and dungeons for a more atmospheric and practical lighting experience.
Lanterns Of Skyrim II.author: MannyGT

Guard Dialogue Overhaul SE.summary: Improves guard dialogue so guards no longer reference player actions they shouldn't be aware of, and adds new dialogue for various situations. Eliminates most immersion-breaking guard comments.
Guard Dialogue Overhaul SE.author: Eckss

Sounds of Skyrim Complete SE.summary: Adds hundreds of new ambient sound effects to Skyrim's dungeons, wilderness, towns, and interiors. Greatly improves atmospheric immersion.
Sounds of Skyrim Complete SE.author: clofas1

Requiem - Dragonborn Patch.summary: Official Requiem patch for the Dragonborn DLC, adjusting enemy stats, leveled lists, and content to fit Requiem's deleveled world. Required if playing with Dragonborn content.
Requiem - Dragonborn Patch.author: Ogerboss

Requiem - Dawnguard Patch.summary: Official Requiem patch for the Dawnguard DLC, rebalancing vampire content and adjusting enemy difficulty for Requiem's deleveled world.
Requiem - Dawnguard Patch.author: Ogerboss

Lux.summary: A comprehensive lighting overhaul using a new approach to interior lighting with real light sources. Dramatically improves indoor ambience across all interiors in Skyrim.
Lux.author: altasilvapuer

DynDOLOD.summary: Generates dynamic distant object level of detail (LOD) for trees, objects, and terrain. Dramatically improves distant landscape quality. Pre-generated for LoreRim — do not regenerate without instructions.
DynDOLOD.author: sheson

Rudy ENB SE for Obsidian Weathers.summary: A high-quality ENB preset tuned for Obsidian Weathers. Provides dramatic post-processing effects, improved shadows, ambient occlusion, and god rays. The visual backbone of LoreRim's aesthetic.
Rudy ENB SE for Obsidian Weathers.author: Rudy102
